---
title: "Mapa Interactivo de Colombia PMTiles"
subtitle: "Departamentos y Municipios · PMTiles + MapLibre GL · Fuente: IGAC / GADM v4.1"
date: today
lang: es
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| cache: false

# ── Generar colombia.pmtiles si no existe ────────────────────────────────
pmtiles_out <- "data/colombia.pmtiles"

if (!file.exists(pmtiles_out)) {
  dept_tmp <- "data/col_departamentos.pmtiles"
  mun_tmp  <- "data/col_municipios.pmtiles"

  if (!file.exists(dept_tmp))
    system2("tippecanoe", c(
      "-o", dept_tmp,
      "--layer=departamentos",
      "--minimum-zoom=3", "--maximum-zoom=10",
      "--simplification=2", "--force",
      "data/col_departamentos.geojson"
    ))

  if (!file.exists(mun_tmp))
    system2("tippecanoe", c(
      "-o", mun_tmp,
      "--layer=municipios",
      "--minimum-zoom=6", "--maximum-zoom=14",
      "--coalesce-densest-as-needed",
      "--extend-zooms-if-still-dropping",
      "--force",
      "data/col_municipios.geojson"
    ))

  system2("tile-join", c(
    "-o", pmtiles_out, "--force",
    dept_tmp, mun_tmp
  ))
}
```

```{=html}
<!-- ── Dependencias MapLibre GL + PMTiles (locales) ────────────────────── -->
<link  href="data/maplibre-gl.css" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="data/maplibre-gl.js"></script>
<script src="data/pmtiles.js"></script>

<style>
  #map-pmtiles {
    width: 100%;
    height: 78vh;
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #c8d6df;
  }

  /* Panel de info inferior */
  #map-info {
    background: rgba(26, 60, 94, 0.85);
    color: white;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
    min-height: 28px;
  }

  /* Control de capas personalizado */
  .layer-toggle {
    position: absolute;
    top: 10px;
    right: 10px;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    z-index: 10;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }
  .layer-toggle label { cursor: pointer; }
  .layer-toggle input  { margin-right: 6px; accent-color: #1a3c5e; }
</style>

<div style="position:relative;">
  <div id="map-pmtiles"></div>

  <!-- Control de capas -->
  <div class="layer-toggle">
    <b style="display:block;margin-bottom:4px;color:#1a3c5e">Capas</b>
    <label><input type="checkbox" id="chk-dept" checked> Departamentos</label><br>
    <label><input type="checkbox" id="chk-mun"  checked> Municipios (zoom ≥ 7)</label>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="map-info">Colombia · 33 departamentos · 1119 municipios · Fuente: IGAC / GADM v4.1</div>

<script>
(function () {
  // ── 1. Registrar protocolo PMTiles ANTES de crear el mapa ──────────────
  const protocol = new pmtiles.Protocol();
  maplibregl.addProtocol("pmtiles", protocol.tile.bind(protocol));

  // URL absoluta del archivo PMTiles (resuelve correctamente relativa a la página)
  const pmtilesUrl = "pmtiles://" + new URL("data/colombia.pmtiles", window.location.href).href;

  // ── 2. Inicializar mapa solo con basemap en el estilo inicial ───────────
  const map = new maplibregl.Map({
    container: "map-pmtiles",
    style: {
      version: 8,
      sources: {
        "carto-light": {
          type: "raster",
          tiles: [
            "https://a.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}.png",
            "https://b.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}.png"
          ],
          tileSize: 256,
          attribution: "© <a href='https://carto.com/'>CartoDB</a> © <a href='https://openstreetmap.org'>OSM</a>"
        }
      },
      layers: [
        { id: "basemap", type: "raster", source: "carto-light" }
      ]
    },
    center: [-74.3, 4.5],
    zoom: 5.2,
    minZoom: 3,
    maxZoom: 16
  });

  map.addControl(new maplibregl.NavigationControl(), "top-left");
  map.addControl(new maplibregl.ScaleControl({ unit: "metric" }), "bottom-left");

  map.on("error", (e) => console.error("[MapLibre]", e.error));

  // ── 3. Agregar fuente PMTiles y capas después del load ──────────────────
  map.on("load", () => {

    // Fuente PMTiles
    map.addSource("colombia", {
      type: "vector",
      url: pmtilesUrl
    });

    // Relleno departamentos
    map.addLayer({
      id: "dept-fill",
      type: "fill",
      source: "colombia",
      "source-layer": "departamentos",
      paint: {
        "fill-color": "#c8dce8",
        "fill-opacity": 0.5
      }
    });

    // Borde departamentos
    map.addLayer({
      id: "dept-line",
      type: "line",
      source: "colombia",
      "source-layer": "departamentos",
      paint: {
        "line-color": "#1a3c5e",
        "line-width": ["interpolate", ["linear"], ["zoom"], 3, 0.7, 10, 2.0]
      }
    });

    // Highlight hover departamento
    map.addLayer({
      id: "dept-hover",
      type: "fill",
      source: "colombia",
      "source-layer": "departamentos",
      paint: {
        "fill-color": "#2c6fa6",
        "fill-opacity": ["case", ["boolean", ["feature-state", "hover"], false], 0.55, 0]
      }
    });

    // Relleno municipios (visible desde zoom 7)
    map.addLayer({
      id: "mun-fill",
      type: "fill",
      source: "colombia",
      "source-layer": "municipios",
      minzoom: 7,
      paint: {
        "fill-color": "#f59e0b",
        "fill-opacity": 0.25
      }
    });

    // Borde municipios
    map.addLayer({
      id: "mun-line",
      type: "line",
      source: "colombia",
      "source-layer": "municipios",
      minzoom: 7,
      paint: {
        "line-color": "#92400e",
        "line-width": ["interpolate", ["linear"], ["zoom"], 7, 0.4, 14, 1.2]
      }
    });

    // Highlight hover municipio
    map.addLayer({
      id: "mun-hover",
      type: "fill",
      source: "colombia",
      "source-layer": "municipios",
      minzoom: 7,
      paint: {
        "fill-color": "#b45309",
        "fill-opacity": ["case", ["boolean", ["feature-state", "hover"], false], 0.55, 0]
      }
    });

    // ── 4. Control de visibilidad de capas ────────────────────────────────
    document.getElementById("chk-dept").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
      const vis = e.target.checked ? "visible" : "none";
      ["dept-fill", "dept-line", "dept-hover"].forEach(id => map.setLayoutProperty(id, "visibility", vis));
    });

    document.getElementById("chk-mun").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
      const vis = e.target.checked ? "visible" : "none";
      ["mun-fill", "mun-line", "mun-hover"].forEach(id => map.setLayoutProperty(id, "visibility", vis));
    });
  });

  // ── 5. Hover interactivo ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  let hoveredDept = null;
  let hoveredMun  = null;
  const infoEl = document.getElementById("map-info");

  function clearHover(source, sourceLayer, id) {
    if (id !== null) map.setFeatureState({ source, sourceLayer, id }, { hover: false });
  }
  function applyHover(source, sourceLayer, id) {
    if (id !== null) map.setFeatureState({ source, sourceLayer, id }, { hover: true });
  }

  map.on("mousemove", "dept-hover", (e) => {
    if (!e.features.length) return;
    const feat = e.features[0];
    if (hoveredDept !== null && hoveredDept !== feat.id)
      clearHover("colombia", "departamentos", hoveredDept);
    hoveredDept = feat.id;
    applyHover("colombia", "departamentos", hoveredDept);
    map.getCanvas().style.cursor = "pointer";
    infoEl.innerHTML = `<b>${feat.properties.departamento}</b> &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${feat.properties.codigo_hasc || ""}`;
  });

  map.on("mouseleave", "dept-hover", () => {
    clearHover("colombia", "departamentos", hoveredDept);
    hoveredDept = null;
    map.getCanvas().style.cursor = "";
    infoEl.textContent = "Colombia · 33 departamentos · 1119 municipios · Fuente: IGAC / GADM v4.1";
  });

  map.on("mousemove", "mun-hover", (e) => {
    if (!e.features.length) return;
    const feat = e.features[0];
    if (hoveredMun !== null && hoveredMun !== feat.id)
      clearHover("colombia", "municipios", hoveredMun);
    hoveredMun = feat.id;
    applyHover("colombia", "municipios", hoveredMun);
    map.getCanvas().style.cursor = "pointer";
    infoEl.innerHTML = `<b>${feat.properties.municipio}</b> &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${feat.properties.departamento}`;
  });

  map.on("mouseleave", "mun-hover", () => {
    clearHover("colombia", "municipios", hoveredMun);
    hoveredMun = null;
    map.getCanvas().style.cursor = "";
    infoEl.textContent = "Colombia · 33 departamentos · 1119 municipios · Fuente: IGAC / GADM v4.1";
  });

  // ── 6. Popup al hacer clic ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  const popup = new maplibregl.Popup({ closeButton: false, maxWidth: "220px" });

  map.on("click", (e) => {
    const queryLayers = map.getZoom() >= 7
      ? ["mun-hover", "dept-hover"]
      : ["dept-hover"];

    const feats = map.queryRenderedFeatures(e.point, { layers: queryLayers });
    if (!feats.length) { popup.remove(); return; }

    const f = feats[0];
    const isMun = f.layer.id === "mun-hover";

    popup
      .setLngLat(e.lngLat)
      .setHTML(isMun
        ? `<b style="font-size:13px">${f.properties.municipio}</b>
           <br><span style="font-size:11px;color:#555">${f.properties.departamento}</span>`
        : `<b style="font-size:13px">${f.properties.departamento}</b>
           <br><span style="font-size:11px;color:#555">${f.properties.codigo_hasc || ""}</span>`)
      .addTo(map);
  });

})();
</script>
```

---

> **Nota metodológica:** Los datos cartográficos corresponden a la división político-administrativa oficial de Colombia según el [Instituto Geográfico Agustín Codazzi — IGAC](https://www.igac.gov.co) y el [Marco Geoestadístico Nacional del DANE](https://www.dane.gov.co), descargados mediante [GADM v4.1](https://gadm.org) y convertidos al formato [PMTiles](https://docs.protomaps.com) para distribución eficiente vía HTTP Range Requests.
